text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross and I go to see a trending fantasy
flick, but after leaving the cinema, I can't help
feeling she's behaving a little... strangely.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh! If it isn't Tamtam and her trainer. Fancy
seeing the two of you here!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Did you see Blue the Magician and the Secret Isle ? It's awesome, right?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah, it was! But what are the chances of us
bumpin' into you two!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
That film had so many cute, creative critters in it.
Seeing them all was such a delight!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
One of them had a flower growing out of its head.
I wonder if they have to water that flower every
morning.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah, I, uh, bet they do... Watchin' that film
was like visitin' a zoo of magical creatures. It was
real fun. Ha... haha...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna go, um... I'm gonna check out the
p-potted plants over there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross scurries off. I chase after her, and
when I catch up...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer! Yeah, I'm doin' real good... How
come?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ...Ugh. Well, maybe "real good" is a stretch.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I... can't handle anythin' gooey or sticky. Same
with slimy foods. Natto? I can't even look at it.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...Back when I was a kid, I had a cup of pudding I
was savin' for a special occasion. I was keepin' it
safe, waitin' for the right moment, but then...

text_block_list.name: Young Tamamo
text_block_list.text:
What happened to my pudding?! It's all white 'n
sticky now!

text_block_list.name: Young Tamamo
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what do I do?! I gotta eat it fast before it
gets any worse!

text_block_list.name: Young Tamamo
text_block_list.text: Munch. Urk?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ...As you'd imagine, that didn't go well.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... So just now, when all those slimy blob
guys showed up at the climax...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't handle it. I was gettin' shivers—it felt
like the big gooey mess was seepin' outta the
screen and into my brain...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Ugh, I just made myself feel worse.
choice_data_list: How about we take a break?
Want me to give you a piggyback ride home?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Nah, don't mind me! We didn't come all the way
here just to sit around!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ya wanted to buy somethin', right? We haven't
even hit the shops yet. 'Sides...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taking a reluctant Tamamo Cross by the hand, I
lead her to the mall's reception desk.
choice_data_list: Excuse me, do you have a rest area?

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text: We do. I'll show you the way.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Ugh... Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for this. Sometimes... ya really come
through for me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After Tamamo Cross's condition improves, the
two of us go and grab some warm udon.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: A piggyback?! I'm not a kid! C'mon!
choice_data_list: But you look a bit woozy...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You're just bein' a worrywart. I've just gotta clear
my head and forget all about the sticky stuff!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
C'mon brain, forget all the gross, gooey stuff! All
the nasty... oozy...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Urp...
choice_data_list: All right, I'm giving you a piggyback, okay?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I'm fine!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ...Is what I wanna say, but I'm not gonna talk ya outta this, am I?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Sorry for makin' ya do this, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I slowly carry her home, Tamamo Cross drifts
off to sleep. Everything's quiet, save for her soft
breaths...
